waves.name: Verify
waves.exit_criteria: All 10 verify tasks closed. Each carries a substrate-honesty verdict: HONEST (code-grounded confirmation) | GAP (new fix task added) | NOT-EXERCISABLE-WITHOUT-OPS (deferred per chokepoint-defer pattern from v2).

waves.name: Cleanup + Seed
waves.gate: W-0 verify complete; any GAPs documented
waves.exit_criteria: Drift sweep landed (deprecated fields removed where safe); seed.ts populates all 9 product-meaningful unseeded tables; new fix tasks from W-0 either landed or deferred with revisit_when.

waves.name: Test fixtures
waves.gate: W-1 complete (seed reflects substrate; schema drift cleared)
waves.exit_criteria: Integration tests exist for each substrate claim audited in W-0. Test suite runs against seedAll output.
